_comment: Pinned antctl-status fixture for adapter-autonomi (storage.sovereign, P1 farming). UNVERIFIED: field names/units mirror the DOCUMENTED Node Launchpad data set (per-node status, memory, bandwidth, storage, records, rewards address, ANT earned, connection) but the exact JSON keys of a live `antctl status --json` are not yet confirmed. When a real node is running, replace this with captured output and reconcile the NodeStatus struct. No datum here is invented beyond the shape antctl is documented to expose. Addresses are non-spendable placeholders — never fund them.
